full_text: The other issue I think is about 35% of girls who start developing symptoms at age of 11 will also have deeply infiltrating endometriosis. So they have endometriosis affecting the rectum. They'll often have bowel symptoms as well.

segments.text: The other issue I think is about 35% of girls who start developing symptoms at age of 11 will also have deeply infiltrating endometriosis.
So they have endometriosis affecting the rectum. They'll often have bowel symptoms as well.
